data.description:
## Story S9: Update project docs to reflect background-primitive migration

### Description
**What**: Update CLAUDE.md (Architecture section references to test-batched / nohup harnesses; Quick Reference commands; rule 19 on `make test-unit-only`), CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md (new config keys: `commands.test_kill_grace_seconds`, plus references to 87e9-0bc8's `commands.test_runner` / `commands.test_file_runner`), KNOWN-ISSUES.md (retire INC-016 if present; add any new known limitations from scenarios), and relevant ADRs.
**Why**: Future agents reading CLAUDE.md need accurate awareness of the new primitive, the retired harnesses, and the orchestrator contract.
**Scope**:
- IN: updates to existing docs only (CLAUDE.md, CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md, KNOWN-ISSUES.md, ADRs)
- OUT: COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md contract section (covered by S8), INSTALL.md pointer (S8), new doc files or patterns

### Done Definitions
- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md Architecture section references the new primitive and removes references to `test-batched.sh`, `nohup-launch.sh`, `nohup-poll.sh`
  ← Satisfies: downstream traceability (docs consistency with S6 removals)
- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md rule 19 no longer references `make test-unit-only` / `test-batched` timeout workaround — the new primitive handles long-running suites natively via `run_in_background`
  ← Satisfies: docs consistency with the new primitive's capability
- When this story is complete, a tree-wide grep for the retired script basenames in `plugins/dso/docs/` returns zero live references (excluding CHANGELOG)
  ← Satisfies: documentation consistency with S6

### Considerations
- [Maintainability] Follow `.claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md` for formatting and structure
## Escalation Policy
**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
data.title: Update project docs to reflect background-primitive migration
